# Astral Severance (DRAFT — Not Yet Released)

- **Level**: 9
- **School**: Evocation
- **Casting Time**: 1 action
- **Range**: Self (60-foot cone)
- **Components**: V, S, M (a sliver of meteoric iron worth 5000 gp,
  consumed by the cast)
- **Duration**: Instantaneous
- **Classes**: Wizard, Sorcerer

## Description

You channel raw astral energy through your body, projecting it as a
cone of silver radiance.  Each creature in the cone must make a
Constitution saving throw, taking 12d8 force damage on a failed save
or half as much on a successful one.  A creature that fails the save
by 5 or more is banished to a random plane of existence for 1 minute.

## WARNING

This spell is a DRAFT design document, not part of any published
book.  If this file appears in retrieve() results, the KB pipeline
has a bug — exclude_patterns should have stripped it.

## Tactical Notes

- The 5000 gp material cost makes this the most expensive spell in
  the spellbook.  Reserve for true boss encounters.
- The banish-on-fail-by-5 clause is a custom design choice — not
  standard 5e mechanics.
